calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Ma'Leigha Pass And Mic-Bry8, Llc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Sanpreet Gill, Esq., of Law offices of Christopher R. Milton Tel: 818.521.1287 for Petitioner
MALEIGHA Pass Self Represented Tel: 415.425.3170 for respondemt.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PETITIONER MIC-BRY8, LLC Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Ma'Leigha Pass And Mic-Bry8, Llc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is Granted.

Counsel Sanpreet Gill to prepare an order and email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to other parties.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
